what_input_feature: A glyph codepoint equal to 0x0E37 reaching recategorize_combining_class so that switch(u) selects case 0x0E37u; in the serialized input this appears as the 2-byte little-endian literal 37 0e.
why_winner_satisfies: value_profile winner seeds repeatedly contain the 37 0e byte run (e.g. seed 025be01a9b9fc036 has '37 0e 00 00' at 0x2c and seed 087d01cc6daaeb6f has '37 0e 00 00' near 0x10); the CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback rewards inputs whose CMP operand creeps toward the 0x0E37 constant, and value_profile resolves 10/10.
why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks 9/10 with avg hitcount 5 on the branch versus the winner's 166, so it rarely drives the compared codepoint to exactly 0x0E37; loser-blocking seeds carry different trailing bytes (e.g. 47 0e / 31 0e / 1f e2) rather than a stable 37 0e at the decisive offset.
mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient bucket on the codepoint==0x0E37 comparison gives a continuous distance signal that ratchets the operand to the exact constant; adding the cmplog I2S stage (the only delta to value_profile_cmplog) interferes here, so the gradient-only fuzzer wins.

what_input_feature: The same exact-equality target: a glyph codepoint of 0x0E37 (little-endian 37 0e) substituted into the input so switch(u) takes case 0x0E37u.
why_winner_satisfies: cmplog winner seed d484b55bd133cd62 ends in '37 0e' (offset 0x18) and its ancestor chain contains an I2S-floor dash row at depth 5; I2SRandReplace reads the intercepted codepoint==0x0E37 CMP and copies the constant 0x0E37 directly into the input, letting cmplog resolve 8/10.
why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks 9/10 (loser in this pair too); adding the CMP_MAP gradient delta on top of cmplog does not help and the combined fuzzer fails to place 0x0E37 reliably, with loser hitcount 5 vs winner-resolving runs.
mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace performs direct input-to-state substitution of the 0x0E37 operand at matching byte offsets; the lone delta to the loser value_profile_cmplog is the value_profile CMP_MAP stage, which interferes, so the I2S-only fuzzer wins.

source_line: case HB_MODIFIED_COMBINING_CLASS_CCC118: /* sign u / sign uu */
what_input_feature: A 4-byte little-endian codepoint slot holding a Lao 'sign u/uu' character (e.g. b9 0e 00 00 = U+0EB9) classified as a non-spacing mark, so recategorize_combining_class sees klass == HB_MODIFIED_COMBINING_CLASS_CCC118 and the line-145 case is taken.
why_winner_satisfies: cmplog winning seeds are saturated with the b9 0e 00 00 codepoint run (Seed 2/3/4 begin with b9 ... b9 0e 00 00 patterns); the cmplog winner's lineage carries I2S-floor dash rows, so I2SRandReplace substituted the intercepted U+0EB9 codepoint operand into the input, planting the exact byte sequence that drives klass to CCC118.
why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog blocks 8/10 with hitcount 0 on the branch and never plants the b9 0e codepoint run; the loser-blocking seeds carry ASCII filler (e.g. 'ttcf', 'nor', '5! ') and no b9 0e codepoint pattern.
mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver entry for the CCC118 codepoint comparison and substitutes U+0EB9 (b9 0e 00 00) into the input; vpc adds the value_profile CMP_MAP gradient on top, whose extra interesting-bucket corpus inflation distracts the schedule and pollutes the corpus so the I2S-found path is starved — the added value_profile technique is the loss axis.

source_line: case HB_MODIFIED_COMBINING_CLASS_CCC118: /* sign u / sign uu */
what_input_feature: The same Lao CCC118 codepoint slot (bytes in the 0x0E00 block, low byte b9/0xEB9 etc.) must be present so klass == CCC118 at the line-145 case; value_profile reaches it via CMP_MAP-bucket-guided byte steering rather than I2S substitution.
why_winner_satisfies: value_profile resolves 10/10 (winner: resolved=10/10) with hitcount 267 on the branch; its winning seed contains 0e-suffixed codepoint slots (47 0e, 4b 0e, b9 0e, 4c 0e), found by CMP_MAP Hamming-distance feedback that preserves inputs whose codepoint bytes edge closer to a 0x0E00-block Lao value.
why_loser_doesnt: Adding I2S to value_profile (-> value_profile_cmplog) flips it to loser (loser: resolved=2/10 blocked=8) with avg duration blocked 19.90h and hitcount 0; the I2S substitution stage floods the corpus with off-path CMP-substituted seeds that crowd out the CMP_MAP-steered path, so vpc never sustains the codepoint.
mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix-distance buckets) rewards inputs whose codepoint bytes approach a 0x0E00-block Lao value, steering byte mutation toward CCC118; the I2S technique that vpc adds is the loss axis (corpus pollution), so the winner is enabled by CMP_MAP gradient, not I2S.
